policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="requestedModel" value="@{
            try { return context.Request.Body?.As(true)?["model"]?.ToString() ?? "unknown"; }
            catch { return "unknown"; }
        }" />
        
        
            
                
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        return new JObject(
                            new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                new JProperty("code", "model_not_allowed"),
                                new JProperty("message", "Model '" + (string)context.Variables["requestedModel"] + "' is not on the storyteller allow-list. Permitted: gpt-5.2, DeepSeek-V3.2, Mistral-Large-3.")
                            ))
                        ).ToString();
                    }
